channel.title: Data-Flows on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Data-Flows on Systology

item.title: Data Processing Architectures
item.description: A deep architectural comparison of data processing pipelines: evaluating Apache Spark’s batch ETL model against Apache Beam’s portable unified model and Apache Flink’s native API for stateful processing.

item.title: Networking & Services
item.description: Operational guidance for resilient networked services; detailing robust API contracts, exponential retries with jitter, sliding-window rate limiting, strict timeout budgets, connection pooling, and mutual TLS.

item.title: Privacy & Agents
item.description: Privacy-first design rules for autonomous AI agents; establishing local-first execution defaults, strict data minimization and redaction, explicit user consent flows, and transparent, auditable action logs.
